_comment: Token counts for the 55-query suite, measured — not estimated. Claude counts come from Anthropic's count_tokens endpoint on the exact prompts phase0/run_baseline.py builds (schema + house-style rules + question); output is the gold SQL tokenized by the same model (54 queries — sim_05 has no gold SQL). Qwen counts come from the Qwen2.5-Coder tokenizer on the identical prompts, and are recorded only to show the tokenizer gap: Sonnet 5 counts ~1.9x the input tokens Qwen does, so pricing the API off Qwen's numbers would understate cost by ~47%.
